commands.review_summary:
The PR adds broad Telegram pipeline performance changes, agent benchmark artifacts, auto-reply helper caches and fast paths, workspace bootstrap parallel reads, and a typing keepalive refactor.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR findings by source inspection: the PR head changes the audio preflight condition/order, keepalive running-state semantics, and no-fence markdown chunking path. No high-confidence live reproduction was established for the claimed performance wins.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof and must be rebased or split before automation can safely help.

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a session-maintenance preserve-key provider seam, registers active and cleanup-pending subagent child session keys, and adds focused pruning/registry regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus the linked report's log ordering give a high-confidence path: with enforce mode and a saturated maxEntries cap, current main preserves only the active writer key while subagent announce/result capture still depends on the child session row.
